user.title: Connect to LiteLLM Proxy
user.description: Enter your LiteLLM proxy URL and API key.

data_description.base_url: The URL of your LiteLLM proxy, without the /v1 suffix

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure LiteLLM Proxy
reconfigure.description: Update your LiteLLM proxy URL and API key.

data_description.base_url: The URL of your LiteLLM proxy, without the /v1 suffix
data_description.api_key: Your LiteLLM virtual API key (re-enter to confirm the change)

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate LiteLLM Proxy
reauth_confirm.description: The API key for {base_url} is no longer valid. Enter a new API key.

models.title: Select Model
models.description: {model_count} models found on your LiteLLM proxy. Select a default model for conversation and AI tasks.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the LiteLLM proxy. Check the URL and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your LiteLLM virtual key.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for more details.

data_description.prompt: Instructions for the AI. Leave blank to use the default Home Assistant prompt.
data_description.reasoning_effort: Reasoning effort for o-series models. Set to 'None' for standard models.
data_description.web_search: Allow the model to search the web (requires provider support via LiteLLM).
data_description.web_search_context_size: How much search context to retrieve when web search is enabled.
data_description.guardrails: Comma-separated LiteLLM guardrail names to apply to requests (e.g. 'pii-mask').
data_description.llm_hass_api: Select a Home Assistant LLM API to allow the agent to control your home.
data_description.name: A friendly name for this conversation agent.

abort.already_configured: This text-to-speech provider is already configured.

authentication_error.message: Authentication failed. Check your LiteLLM API key.

rate_limit_error.message: LiteLLM rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.

connection_error.message: Unable to connect to the LiteLLM proxy.

remember.name: Remember
remember.description: Save a durable fact to the assistant's long-term memory. The fact is injected into future conversations with agents using the LiteLLM Extended Tools API.

forget.name: Forget
forget.description: Delete long-term memories whose text contains the given fragment (case-insensitive).

text.name: Text
text.description: Fragment to match against stored memories.

dream.name: Dream
dream.description: Run one memory-consolidation pass: analyze conversation transcripts since the last dream (plus optional household activity) and add/update/delete long-term memories.

model.name: Model
model.description: Model override for the dream call. Defaults to the AI Task subentry's model.

include_activity.name: Include activity
include_activity.description: Also analyze recent logbook activity (automations, presence, locks).

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Return proposed memory operations without applying them.

clear_transcripts.name: Clear transcripts
clear_transcripts.description: Wipe the conversation transcript buffer used by dreaming.
